subcodes.first_line: At all times We make mention of God, the Goal of all worlds. Throughout all days moveth the Pen of the Lord of mankind, that hearts may be drawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی کل حین نذکر الله مقصود العالمین فی کل الایام یتحرک قلم مالک الانام لتنجذب
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
